title: Glassbox updates and training improvements
summary:
I spent the last few days working on the Glassbox classifier. I simplified the operator ontology to 9 classes and added XGBoost for better performance. The data generation is much faster now because of the new streaming mode. I can finally create 1M+ datasets without running out of RAM.

In the training script, I added gradient clipping and fixed the BatchNorm order. I also caught some silent failures in L-BFGS that were bothering me for a long time. I fixed import errors and added CUDA cache cleanup so the GPU does not crash. The LASSO coordinate descent is now faster too. Everything feels much more stable now.
commitMessages: refactor(classifier): simplify ontology, improve training pipeline, add XGBoost
fix(sr): harden evolution error handling and integration imports
fix(scripts): optimize classifier scripts with bug fixes and performance improvements
